subcodes.first_line: O daughter of the Kingdom! The epistle was received and the Convention of the delegates of the Mashrek-el-Azkar on the day of Naurooz, at Chicago, proved a cause of joy
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنت ملکوت نامه رسید و اجتماع مبعوثان مشرق الاذکار در روز نوروز در شیکاغو
subcodes.subjects: @role and station of women, @House of Worship [Mashriqu'l-Adhkar], @sacred remains; burial of the Bab
